title: Backend API Engineering
summary: Design and build production-grade REST APIs with clear contracts, validation, and maintainable service boundaries.
capabilities: Design resource-oriented endpoints and versioned API contracts
Implement auth-ready request validation with Pydantic and schema-first patterns
Document APIs with OpenAPI/Swagger for fast team onboarding

title: Data Modeling & SQL
summary: Model relational data that stays consistent under real-world workloads and grows cleanly over time.
capabilities: Normalize schemas and choose pragmatic denormalization where it improves performance
Write reliable SQL queries and optimize joins, indexes, and access patterns
Translate product requirements into storage and query strategies

title: Cloud & Serverless Systems
summary: Ship lightweight, event-driven cloud services with observability and predictable deployment workflows.
capabilities: Build serverless backends on AWS Lambda with API Gateway
Automate build and deployment pipelines with GitHub Actions
Structure cloud functions for low-latency cold-start-conscious execution

title: Python Web Frameworks
summary: Use Python ecosystems effectively to move from idea to tested backend services quickly.
capabilities: Develop asynchronous services in FastAPI and structured applications in Django
Create reusable modules, clean service layers, and testable routing logic
Integrate third-party APIs safely with timeout and retry-aware patterns
